name: Brute
location: Opening tutorial / Wasteland (Life of the Scavengers)
weakness: Fire-fueled fists have long wind-ups; perfect parry opens retribution.
keyTip: In the tutorial, survive until Tachy intervenes. In the rematch, stay mobile and punish after double-fist slams.

name: Gigas
weakness: Slow melee slams and shockwaves; explosive barrels in the Wasteland arena.
keyTip: Parry the heavy slams, use Blink for unblockable shockwaves, and shoot barrels when Gigas is nearby.

name: Abaddon
location: Great Desert (An Eye for an Eye side quest)
weakness: Lightning-infused sword attacks; limited arena in the rematch.
keyTip: Dodge sideways from lightning strikes and use Triplet to break its balance quickly.

name: Corrupter
weakness: Ranged gun attachments work well when it creates distance.
keyTip: Close the gap after its projectile volleys and use Slash for AoE clear of smaller Naytibas.

name: Juggernaut
weakness: Slow axe swings and grapples; weak to staggering from gun attachments.
keyTip: Keep your distance, bait the axe slam, then punish from behind.

name: Behemoth
weakness: Fast charges and heavy swipes, but predictable after repeated patterns.
keyTip: Do not get greedy. Counter its charge with Blink and use Descending Break to down it.

name: Karakuri
weakness: Disables your drone; weak to grenade stuns and melee pressure.
keyTip: Stock grenades, stay close, and use Beta skills during its recovery windows.

name: Tachy
weakness: Multi-phase fight; black-wing and tentacle arm attacks have distinct tells.
keyTip: Patience is key. Learn each phase's rhythm, save healing for the final room, and abuse Blink for fatal attacks.

name: Maelstrom
weakness: Three external weak spots; exposed mouth weak point after they are destroyed.
keyTip: Stay mobile, focus fire on weak spots with your gun, and watch for disguised body bags.

name: Raven (Naytiba Form)
weakness: Concentration attack can be interrupted; gun attachments help when she flies.
keyTip: Always be ready to knock her out of the instant-kill charge. Prioritize survival over aggression.

name: Providence
weakness: Final boss; patterns escalate based on chosen ending path.
keyTip: Save Burst skills for phase transitions and use Tachy Mode whenever it becomes available.
